planSteps.description: Navigate to the auth login page at https://viziito-auth-test.loca.lt/auth/login
Fill '136.185.66.40' into the localtunnel password field if visible
Click 'Click to Submit' or 'Continue' button to bypass localtunnel password page
Click 'Reload' button if necessary to load the React app after localtunnel bypass
Click 'Email + Password' tab or button on the login screen
Fill 'john.doe@hospital.com' into the Email Address input field
Fill 'password123' into the Password input field
Verify that the dashboard screen is loaded and the URL changes to '/dashboard' or indicates dashboard access
